name: CREDITRISKMONITOR COM INC
summary: CreditRiskMonitor.com, Inc. (CRMZ) is a SaaS company providing web-based commercial credit risk analytics and monitoring tools. Its primary products, CreditRiskMonitor and SupplyChainMonitor, offer bankruptcy prediction scores (FRISK for public companies, 96% accurate; PAYCE for private companies, 80% accurate), commercial credit reports, financial spreads, trade payment data, and curated news alerts. Subscribers include nearly 40% of the Fortune 1000, using the platform to manage trade credit risk, supplier financial risk, and counterparty relationships globally.
